wins: Organizational simplification completed, resulting in a cleaner structure and faster decision-making
Strong Q1 performance with net income of $3.4 billion and RoTCE of 7.6%
Services revenue up 8% year-over-year with strong fee growth
Investment Banking revenue growth of 35% and overall banking revenue growth of 49%
Positive client sentiment and strong balance sheet with CET1 ratio of 13.5%
risks: Credit card charge-offs remain elevated, with Retail Services NCLs above full-year guidance
Uncertainty around macroeconomic conditions and global rate trajectories
Potential for higher capital requirements due to ongoing transformation and regulatory changes
Challenges in achieving 4% to 5% medium-term revenue growth
Higher credit costs and inflationary pressures impacting returns
